title: OREGON REPRODUCTIVE HEALTH PROGRAM CLINIC - 211info
text: MERLO STATION HIGH SCHOOL SBHC OREGON REPRODUCTIVE HEALTH PROGRAM CLINIC Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF A statewide network of certified health care providers that ensure access to a variety of reproductive health services. Services include annual gynecological exams, pap tests, breast exams, STI screening and treatment. Offers pregnancy testing, birth control counseling, contraception, emergency contraception and abortions. 1841 SW Merlo Drive Beaverton, OR 97003 Eligibility: Individuals with an income below 250% Federal Poverty Level Hours: Monday-Wednesday 8am-noon and 12:30pm-3:00pm, Thursday 8:00am- noon (503) 941-3210 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Main phone (503) 941-3210 INTAKE PROCEDURE: Call for information and to schedule an appointment FEES: Low cost or free based on service, insurance will be billed if applicable. Sliding scale fees available. DOCUMENTS: None required at intake LANGUAGES: English, Spanish, and other intrepretation by arrangement AREA SERVED: Washington County TRAVEL/LOCATION INFORMATION: The Merlo Rd/SW 158th Ave MAX Station is located a few blocks away from the school and services the Blue Line. Services: Abortion Referrals Birth Control Counseling Breast Examinations Contraception Emergency Contraception General Sexuality/Reproductive Health Education Pap Tests Pregnancy Testing Sexually Transmitted Infection Screening Other Services Offered At This Location: EDUCATIONAL SUPPORT SERVICES - SCHOOL BASED HEALTH CENTER If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service. MERLO STATION HIGH SCHOOL SBHC
